symbols: simple dress of maid — humility and poverty
description: A medieval scene in a palace interior. A young woman in a simple white dress stands on steps beneath pink curtains, looking down at a richly dressed king who kneels before her offering something. He wears a red and gold royal robe. Grand columns and a chandelier frame the background. The painting has a romanticized, Pre-Raphaelite aesthetic.

_meta.title: The King and the Beggar Maid
